videos.title: Set Up Hermes Agent Desktop (No Terminal Needed)
videos.description: Nous Research's open-source self-improving AI agent now has a desktop app — no terminal required. This quick start walks you through downloading it, connecting a model, and chatting in about 10 minutes (Mac, Windows & Linux).

resources.label: Read the Hermes Desktop setup guide

videos.title: 20 Free AI Tools Every Student Should Activate (.edu)
videos.description: Five free subscriptions every student needs before graduation — GitHub Student Pack, Cursor Pro, Notion, Figma, and Perplexity — plus 15 more you can unlock free (or near-free) with your .edu email. Every link from the video in one place.

videos.title: I Tried PewDiePie's AI OS So You Don't Have To (Part 2)
videos.description: Part 2 of the deep dive into PewDiePie's AI operating system — what it actually does, where it shines, and whether it's worth setting up yourself.

videos.title: PewDiePie Just Changed Coding Forever (Odysseus Setup Guide)
videos.description: PewDiePie's Odysseus setup, walked through step by step. Here's how to get it running yourself.

videos.title: AI Systems Playbooks for Ag & Operators
videos.description: Plain-English playbooks for getting the busywork out of a working operation — order intake, inventory, scheduling, compliance, and follow-up. Start with the 12-point audit to find your biggest leak, then grab the playbook that fits your business.

resources.label: The Ag Operator's AI Systems Audit

videos.title: How to Use Claude (Basically) for Free
videos.description: Three proven methods to run Claude Code with no subscription: OpenRouter (pennies per session), NVIDIA NIM (free credits), and Ollama (fully local, forever free). Pick the one that fits you and be up and running in under 10 minutes.

videos.title: Run Claude Code Free with Ollama
videos.description: Use Claude Code with open-source models through Ollama's Anthropic-compatible API — no Claude subscription, no API bill. One command gets you running in under 5 minutes.

videos.title: 200+ AI Models, One Studio — Open Generative AI
videos.description: Flux, Kling, Veo 3, Sora, Imagen 4 — every major image and video model in one open-source studio. One muapi API key unlocks all of them. Runs in your browser in under 5 minutes, no subscription.

videos.title: GoodMode v2 — The Prompt That Supercharges ChatGPT
videos.description: Turn ChatGPT into a cross-disciplinary strategist with 100x the critical thinking. Paste once into your custom instructions and every chat from then on runs through the framework — sharper questions, structured reasoning, and real sources instead of vibes.

resources.label: Get the full GoodMode v2 prompt

videos.title: Claude Code: Steps 1-5
videos.description: Total-beginner setup guide — from zero to your first Claude Code session in about 30 minutes. Mac and Windows covered.
